title: SirenRailz Immersive Railroading
description: This project adds fully functional sirens to Minecraft using Immersive Railroading
body:
CURRENT ROSTER:

Federal Signal 2T22
Federal Signal Model 7/2
Federal Signal 508
Federal Signal 2001-130
Federal Signal STH 10
Sentry 3V8
Sentry 3V8-H
FS 500AT
FS SD-10
FS Eclipse 8
FS Thunderbolt 1000/1000T (5 and 5/6 port)
ACA Hurricane
ACA Allertor (1st and 3rd gen)
ACA P10
ACA P50
ASC T128
